name: Reading List
description: Track books, articles, tweets, and papers. Save URLs with automatic content extraction, highlights, notes, and semantic search.
author: ultralight

save.description: Save a URL or item to your reading list. Automatically fetches title and content snippet from URLs. Generates embeddings for semantic search.

url.description: URL to save (article, tweet, paper, video)

title.description: Title (auto-extracted from URL if not provided)

returns.description: Saved item with ID and extracted metadata

list.description: List saved items, optionally filtered by tags, type, or read status.

search.description: Search your reading list semantically. Uses embeddings for meaning-based search, with text fallback.

returns.description: Ranked search results with relevance scores

highlight.description: Save a highlight or annotation on a reading list item.

status.description: Overview of your reading list: counts by type and read status, total highlights.
